wins.title: Stash
wins.heroSubtitle: Capture inspiration at a click. Search for it with ideas, not keywords
wins.step2Desc: Search for exactly what you mean
wins.step3Desc: Browse and export the best results
wins.grid1Desc: Looking for 'warm sunset gradients' or 'minimalist product photography'? Just type it. No titling or tagging needed.
wins.grid2Desc: 3x smaller than similar applications, and runs in the background without hogging resources.
wins.grid3Desc: Everything runs locally. The AI, the search, the storage – it's all on your computer.
wins.ctaSubtitle: No credit card. No account. No catch

dmca.title: DMCA & Copyright Policy
dmca.disclosureText: VAWZINE™ is an educational channel dedicated to sharing knowledge about money-making strategies and skill/self development. We are committed to helping individuals learn and grow.
dmca.whatWeDoText: We create and share original content focused on financial education and skill-building. We offer our own digital products and VIP membership for those seeking premium resources - we do NOT sell courses.
dmca.noticeText: All content shared on this channel is intended for educational purposes only. VAWZINE™ does NOT sell courses, only our own original digital products and VIP membership. VAWZINE™ and its administrators are not responsible for how individuals choose to apply the information provided.
dmca.complianceText: VAWZINE™ respects intellectual property rights and complies with the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) under 17 U.S.C. § 512. If you believe any content on our channel infringes upon your copyright, please submit a written DMCA notice containing the following:
dmca.requirement1: Your physical or electronic signature (or that of an authorized representative).
dmca.requirement2: Identification of the copyrighted work you claim has been infringed.
dmca.requirement3: Identification of the specific material and its location on our channel.
dmca.requirement4: Your contact information (address, phone number, email).
dmca.requirement5: A statement of good faith belief that the use is unauthorized.
dmca.requirement6: A statement, under penalty of perjury, that the information provided is accurate and you are authorized to act on behalf of the copyright owner.
dmca.responseTime: We will review and respond to valid DMCA requests within 1-5 business days.
dmca.disclaimerText: The owners and administrators of VAWZINE™ are not liable for any actions taken by users based on the content shared. All information is provided 'as is' for educational purposes.
